title: Drop Zone Drop Event
description: Event emitted when an element is dropped onto a drop zone.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: Shape of the drop zone drop event.

props.name: dropped
props.description: The drag directive instance that was dropped.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: Underlying native event. Inherited from NXNativeEvent.

props.name: sender
props.description: The drop zone directive that sent the event. Inherited from NXEvent.
